title: Codex Persistent Goals and Automatic Continuation · State Clinic: Goal Handoff
summary: Operate a long Codex task with a persistent goal, checkpoints, and user control. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops goal handoff increment in a Codex persistent-goal operating playbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Preserve goal state, decisions, tests, and next actions across sessions.
Distinguish active, paused, completed, and genuinely blocked states.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Goal Handoff evidence
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: loops-goal-handoff-f1pl9f" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Goal Handoff into observable performance evidence.

Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
